title: A guide to solo, analog, dungeon crawls (solo RPG)
body:
This video from The Dungeon Dive provides an in-depth exploration of various solo tabletop RPG dungeon crawl games. We guide you through eight different titles, offering insights into their gameplay, complexity, and unique features. Whether you’re a seasoned dungeon crawler or new to the genre, this video serves as an excellent introduction to these games, each offering a different take on the classic dungeon crawl experience. From the simple, straightforward gameplay of NoteQuest to the richly detailed and complex world of D100 Dungeon, there’s something for everyone. Additionally, we discuss the importance of expansions, the balance between in-dungeon and out-of-dungeon experiences, and the level of player input required in these games. If you’re looking to dive deep into the world of solo tabletop dungeon crawls, this video is a must-watch.

If you’re interested in expanding your collection or trying out new dungeon crawls, this guide will help you make an informed choice on which game might be the best fit for your playstyle. Happy dungeon diving!
